claims.q: Two people were killed and at least 14 were injured when a tornado tore through Coastal City on February 18, according to a report by the Region X Courier
Two people were killed and at least 14 were injured when a tornado tore through Coastal City on February 18, according to a report by the Region X Courier
The Courier report, citing the county emergency office, said 37 homes were destroyed
The National Weather Bureau assigned the tornado a preliminary EF3 rating, the report said
